key_findings: RM stick reader batches 32 sticks per push, CB c_0 sized ntiles_per_block, tilize helper WaitBlock mode
untilize helper, writer extracts 32 sticks per block from CB, TensorAccessor for RM DRAM writes
3-pass streaming pattern (mean/var/normalize), reduce_tile for row reduction, persistent scalar CBs, COL broadcast for subtract/multiply

rationale: Layer norm has same 3-pass dependency as softmax: mean, variance, normalize. Reader sends row 3 times.

functions: reduce<SUM, REDUCE_ROW> for mean and variance row reductions
sub<COL> for subtract mean, square for centered^2, mul<COL> for rsqrt multiply, mul<ROW>/add<ROW> for gamma/beta

choice: Dedicated CBs for persistent scalars (mean, rsqrt_var), separate tilize/untilize CBs
rationale: Mean persists across pass2 and pass3; rsqrt_var persists in pass3. Tilize output feeds compute, untilize input from compute output.
